chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-53 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 04.09.2025 Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh assisted by Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w D.S.P. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, Thull and SIP/SHO Ali Akbar Khokhar, now posted at Police Station Moro, District Naushero Feroze. ------ The Police Officers, present, file their reports, taken on record, wherein they have categorically denied to have custody of alleged missing persons. SIP Ali Akbar Khokhar, present submits that he has now been transferred from Police Station Thull to Police Station Moro, therefore, he has got no nexus or concern with the allegations made against him. The DSP Thull, present submits that one detenue namely Dil Murad has been surfaced. As far as other detenue Abdul Sattar is concerned, the officers present, have categorically denied to have his custody. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh submits that the petitioner is required to file a fresh petition, if the fresh whereabouts of the detenue are known to him. As far as this petition is concerned, in view of above its purpose has been served. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner acceded to the proposal so advanced by the learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Manzoor
